x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Integration Hub is the execution layer for AI Agent actions that interact with external systems. Without active Integration Hub spokes, AI Agents cannot perform real-world automation beyond the ServiceNow platform.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Integration Hub via sys_plugins_list.do (search: Integration Hub). Ensure the IntegrationHub Runtime and relevant spokes are active. AI Agents rely on spokes for external system actions.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ceb
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Integration Hub is the execution layer for AI Agent actions that interact with external systems. Without active Integration Hub spokes, AI Agents cannot perform real-world automation beyond the ServiceNow platform.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Integration Hub Activation</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){ var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr.addEncodedQuery("name LIKEIntegration Hub^active=true"); gr.query(); var n=gr.getRowCount(); return{status:n>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" Integration Hub plugins active",finding:n<1?"Integration Hub is not active. AI Agents cannot perform external system automation without active Integration Hub spokes.":"Integration Hub is active -- AI Agents can leverage spokes for external automation."}; })()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>PLATFORM</module> <number>CHK0006106</number> <order>20</order> <remediation_guidance>Activate Integration Hub via sys_plugins_list.do (search: Integration Hub). Ensure the IntegrationHub Runtime and relevant spokes are active. AI Agents rely on spokes for external system actions.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ceb</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
